title: Heavy Fighter Jet-VTOL
wikitext:
[[Image:01 C042 sachi-jump 1.jpg|thumb|left|Heavy Fighter Jet-VTOLs represent the apex of military firepower in 2015, but they are no match for Angels...]]

The '''UN Heavy Fighter Jet (VTOL)''' (UN重戦闘機(VTOL)) is a gunship in use by military forces in the year 2015, flown by both the [[United Nations]] and [[Japanese Strategic Self Defense Force]] squadrons.  Relying on VTOL (Vertical Take-Off and Landing) propulsion like earlier AV-8 Harrier jump-jets and rotor-bladed Bell-Boeing V-22 Osprey transport aircraft, this gunship is very maneuverable, capable of hovering as well as circling around a target, and even reversing.  It achieves its VTOL abilities through use of two tiltable jet engines, located at the end of their stubby wings.

Like earlier helicopter gunships such as the Bell AH-1 Cobra, the Boeing AH-64 Apache and the large Russian Mil Mi-24 Hind, these gunships also have underside hardpoints below their wings for attaching and carrying weaponry, such as folding-fin rockets, guided missiles, gun pods and others.

In addition to [[JSSDF]] (painted in olive drab camouflage) and [[United Nations]] (in white and orange) variants, [[Nerv]] also possesses and operates unarmed civilian versions with the weapon hardpoints deleted, an extended canopy, additional seating, cargo space and a different color scheme, as a number of them are mainly used for transport and medevac purposes.

However, despite their impressive firepower and position at the pinnacle of current military technology, the UN Heavy Fighters are still conventional weapons, incapable of penetrating [[A.T. Field]]s.  [[Image:Eoe vtol kick.jpg|thumb|...or Evangelions]]  Thus, they are almost completely ineffective against both [[Angels]] and [[Evangelions]], which swat them down almost like toys. 

[[Image:1095154153989517313_4.jpg|thumb|Production design from ''Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Production Art Book'']]

==Note==
In ''[[Evangelion 1.0: You Are (Not) Alone]]'', this combat aircraft is designated as ''YAGR-3B Close Air Support VTOL Aircraft''.

[[Category:A to Z]]

The UN Heavy Fighter Jet (VTOL) (UN重戦闘機(VTOL)) is a gunship in use by military forces in the year 2015, flown by both the United Nations and Japanese Strategic Self Defense Force squadrons. Relying on VTOL (Vertical Take-Off and Landing) propulsion like earlier AV-8 Harrier jump-jets and rotor-bladed Bell-Boeing V-22 Osprey transport aircraft, this gunship is very maneuverable, capable of hovering as well as circling around a target, and even reversing. It achieves its VTOL abilities through use of two tiltable jet engines, located at the end of their stubby wings.

Like earlier helicopter gunships such as the Bell AH-1 Cobra, the Boeing AH-64 Apache and the large Russian Mil Mi-24 Hind, these gunships also have underside hardpoints below their wings for attaching and carrying weaponry, such as folding-fin rockets, guided missiles, gun pods and others.

In addition to JSSDF (painted in olive drab camouflage) and United Nations (in white and orange) variants, Nerv also possesses and operates unarmed civilian versions with the weapon hardpoints deleted, an extended canopy, additional seating, cargo space and a different color scheme, as a number of them are mainly used for transport and medevac purposes.

However, despite their impressive firepower and position at the pinnacle of current military technology, the UN Heavy Fighters are still conventional weapons, incapable of penetrating A.T. Fields.

Thus, they are almost completely ineffective against both Angels and Evangelions, which swat them down almost like toys.

Note[edit]

In Evangelion 1.0: You Are (Not) Alone, this combat aircraft is designated as YAGR-3B Close Air Support VTOL Aircraft.
